_comment: Roster template for the convergence study. Exact model id strings, the
host serving each open-weight model, and the run date are pinned at lock
(PRE_REGISTRATION_CONVERGENCE.md, Roster). Entries whose model id starts
with PIN_AT_LOCK are placeholders; the runner refuses to run them.
Anthropic ids are prefilled from the known current lineup and are still
confirmed at lock like everything else.
Fields: model (id sent on the wire), provider (key into
providers.PROVIDERS), arms (A reasoning off, B reasoning on; google is
B-only), host (open-weight models: who serves it, plus any quantization
string the host reports; null for closed first-party APIs),
temperature_mode ('send' = temperature 1.0 in the body, 'omit' = no
temperature key; pinned per model, recorded per row as temperature_sent;
never 0, the measurement depends on natural sampling variance),
thinking_on (anthropic Arm B only: the thinking config to send).
Anthropic temperature_mode is omit on the faithful harness's Q3
precedent: 4.7+ deprecated the parameter and the API default is 1.0,
which satisfies the sampling requirement; revisit per model at lock.

models.host: PIN_AT_LOCK: deepseek first-party API; record served precision if reported
PIN_AT_LOCK: deepseek first-party API; record served precision if reported
PIN_AT_LOCK: z.ai first-party API; record served precision if reported
